objective_1_findings.reason_for_12_rows: DATA_GOV_API_KEY was empty, triggering fallback to mock generator. The mock generator generated exactly 12 records (one for each key station) on a single hardcoded timestamp. Furthermore, any negative values in cleaner caused the entire row to be dropped.
objective_1_findings.cpcb_expansion_fix: Modified cpcb_collector.py to support a configurable window_days parameter (passed from config and CLI). If mock data is used, it generates daily observations for each station over the last N days. Refactored remove_negative_pollutants in cleaners.py to nullify negative values rather than dropping entire rows.
objective_1_findings.run_pipeline_changes: Added --cpcb-window-days CLI parameter to run_pipeline.py and mapped it to the CPCB collection functions. Re-cleaned cpcb_raw_manual.csv, successfully retaining 84 rows.

objective_2_findings.temporal_nearest_valid_pixel: Refactored sentinel5p_collector.py to use server-side mapping and sorting on absolute temporal difference. It selects the nearest valid pixel per coordinate within the configurable search window using ee.Reducer.first().
objective_2_findings.metadata_extraction: Extracted observation date, temporal offset in days, and QA status values for each satellite feature.
objective_2_findings.dataset_propagation: Updated merger.py, feature_builder.py, and dataset_validator.py to accept, merge, and validate these new metadata columns, propagating them directly to analysis_ready_dataset.csv.

objective_3_findings.gee_data_availability_analysis: Discovered that the offline collections of Sentinel-5P L3 and MODIS AOD have physical limits: (a) GEE ingestion lag limits recent data availability (latest image is July 2nd for Sentinel-5P); (b) monsoon cloud cover (June-September) results in 100% of pixels failing the QA filters (cloud fraction < 0.5) over major cities like Delhi during this time range.
objective_3_findings.dataset_regeneration: Regenerated processed_data/satellite_predictors.csv and analysis_ready_dataset.csv (now containing 84 rows and 52 columns, including 18 new metadata columns).
